notification.404-challenge-description: Please verify the provided token and try again.
notification.404-token-description: Please verify the provided token and try again.
notification.404-user-description: The user was not found or the provided token has expired. Please contact the business that sent you this link.
notification.404-user-title: The link you opened is invalid
notification.invalid-config-subtitle: It seems like the Verify with Footprint integration is using an invalid integration key. Please contact the owner of this product.
notification.invalid-domain-description: Sorry, you don't have permission to access this application. It seems that the domain associated with your account is not authorized. If you need assistance, feel free to contact technical support.

notification.missing-args-description: Oops! It seems like some required information is missing. Please navigate back in the process and make sure to provide all necessary details before proceeding.
